description: Pure API response handler optimization - Express res.send() Content-Type deduplication
rationale: Two files changed: lib/response.js (core Express response handler) and History.md (changelog/docs). Path classification: lib/response.js = api domain (Express web framework core). History.md = docs domain but is changelog noise. Semantic analysis: response.js has no new imports (modifies existing code flow). With noise threshold applied, docs contribution from History.md (5 lines) is negligible vs api code (6+13 lines). Effective single domain = PASS.
notes: Tests that clean single-domain import detection works for CommonJS/no-import patterns. The response.js file uses require() style but is clearly API domain by path. History.md changelog should be filtered by noise threshold.
